title: Al-Rashid's Children
description: Of male children, al-Rashid had Muhammad the Elder (i.e., alAmin), by Zubaydah; 'Abdallah al-Ma'mun, by a slave concubine mother (umm waladj called Marajil; l098al-Qasim al-Mu'taman, by a slave concubine mother called Qasif, Abu Ishaq Muhammad al-Mu'ta$im, by a slave concubine mother called Maridah; 'All, by Amat al-'Aziz; $alili, by a slave concubine mother called Ri'm;1099 Abu Isa Muhammad, by a slave concubine mother called Idbah; 1100 Abu Ya'qub Muhammad, by a slave…

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
